title: Polearm Squadron
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Polearm Squadron''' was an [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] in Group One of [[Solo Fleet]].

==History==
Polearm Squadron formed a part of ''[[Mon Remonda]]''{{'s}} fighter complement, and flew in several sorties, including the attack on the stolen [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] ''[[Razor's Kiss]]'', and later campaigns against [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]].

[[Todra Mayn]], flying in Polearm One, was the first pilot to find Zsinj's flagship [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']] as it hid in the [[Selaggis VI]] asteroid belt. The Squadron later suffered heavy losses in the attack, and only Todra Mayn and [[Dorset Konnair]] are known to have survived the [[Battle of Selaggis]].

==Polearm Squadron members==
*Polearm One/Leader, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Todra Mayn]]
*Polearm Two, Flight Officer [[Nuro Tualin]], KIA at the [[Battle of Jussafet Four]]
*Polearm Five, name unknown, KIA at the [[Battle of Kuat (Hunt for Zsinj)|Battle of Kuat]]
*Polearm Seven, Flight Officer [[Dorset Konnair]]
*Polearm Nine, Flight Officer [[Tetengo Noor]], KIA at the [[Battle of Selaggis]]

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Iron Fist]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Iron Fist (unabridged audiobook)}}
*''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)}}
